name: Veg Chowmein
description: Wok-tossed noodles with fresh shredded cabbage, carrots, bell peppers, spring onions, and a splash of dark soy sauce.

name: Egg Chowmein
description: Stir-fried noodles tossed with scrambled eggs, fresh vegetables, and savory Indo-Chinese seasoning.

name: Paneer Chowmein
description: Wok-tossed street style noodles loaded with soft spiced paneer cubes and crisp colorful vegetables.

name: Chicken Chowmein
description: Scorching wok-tossed noodles with juicy chicken shreds, scrambled eggs, cabbage, carrots, and spicy green chillies.

name: Veg Fried Rice
description: Aromatic basmati rice stir-fried in a scorching wok with finely chopped carrots, French beans, and spring onions.

name: Egg Fried Rice
description: Savory wok-tossed long-grain rice with scrambled eggs, fresh green peas, scallions, and a touch of light soy.

name: Paneer Fried Rice
description: Aromatic long-grain basmati rice tossed with golden fried paneer cubes, chopped vegetables, and white pepper.

name: Chicken Fried Rice
description: Classic Tangra-style aromatic rice tossed with succulent chicken cubes, egg shreds, and garlic-seasoned scallions.

name: Chilli Paneer
description: Golden-fried paneer cubes tossed in a glossy, savory soy-chilli glaze with crunchy bell peppers and onions.

name: Chilli Chicken
description: Authentic Kolkata style chilli chicken! Juicy batter-coated chicken pieces tossed with garlic, soy sauce, and green chillies.

name: Crispy Chicken Lollipop
description: Succulent chicken drumettes marinated in aromatic spices, fried to crispy perfection, and served with hot garlic dip.

name: Chilli Gobi Manchurian
description: Crispy cauliflower florets coated in spiced batter, wok-tossed in a sweet and sour Manchurian sauce.

name: Potato Tornado
description: A spiral-sliced whole potato fried to golden-crisp on a skewer, dusted generously with peri-peri and chat masala.

name: Alukatta
description: Nostalgic, traditional street food from the lanes of North Kolkata. Soft spiced potato layered with signature tamarind-chilli infusion, chickpea mash, and bhaja masala. Available only on Sundays from 5:00 PM to 6:00 PM.
